summary: Iteration 3 testing of Tacos POS (propinas %, order_type, efectivo cambio, multicaja, dashboard ampliado, badge removal). Backend pytest suite rewritten for new schema: 16/16 PASS (Users CRUD with caja_name + login of created user; duplicate 409; cashier without sucursal 400; PUT username/password/sucursal/caja_name with relogin; DELETE user; cannot delete unique admin; sales order_type required 422; mesa without mesa_number 400; llevar/domicilio OK without mesa; efectivo cash_received -> change_given 40, insufficient cash 400; dashboard new fields avg_ticket/avg_items/peak_hour/total_items/by_caja/by_order_type/tip_breakdown; dashboard caja filter). Frontend POS (390x844): emergent-badge ABSENT, overscroll-behavior-y='contain' on html+body, login of valle_caja2/caja2pass works, header shows 'VALLE_CAJA2 · CAJA 2 / Valle Dorado', btn-ordertype-{mesa|llevar|domicilio} present, input-mesa toggles correctly (visible only for mesa), empty mesa charge fires toast 'Ingresa el número de mesa' and blocks submit, 2 Tacos + tarjeta + tip-percent-15 -> input-tip=9 and total $69, manual tip 20 then tip-percent-10 -> input-tip=6 (% overrides manual), efectivo cash_received=100 -> change-display 'CAMBIO $40', btn-charge submits, toast 'Venta cobrada $60 · Cambio $40' shown, cart cleared (cart-total=$0). Admin (1280x900): all KPIs present (avg-ticket $59, avg-items 1.86, peak-hour 07:00 $414, items-total 13), ordertype-mesa/llevar/domicilio sections show totals, sucursal Valle Dorado reveals caja-filter with caja-all/caja-Caja 1/caja-Caja 2 and by-caja-section, caja=Caja 2 filter recalculates KPIs (avg-ticket=$78). Users tab CRUD: new-user-username/password/role/sucursal/caja + btn-create-user create a cashier; edit-caja + btn-save-user persists change; btn-delete-user confirms via window.confirm and removes the row (toast 'Usuario eliminado').

issues: Admin row shows an 'Eliminar' button even though backend correctly returns 400 for the unique admin. Consider disabling the button when only one admin exists to give the user a clearer signal (defense in depth, backend already blocks).

critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/users POST/PUT/DELETE have NO auth gating — anyone reaching these URLs can create/modify/delete users (and therefore obtain login credentials). Add an admin token/role check before exposing publicly. Same applies to /api/products and /api/sales endpoints.
server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); migrate to FastAPI lifespan.
Passwords are stored in PLAINTEXT in MongoDB and returned through fallback admin login. For an internal MVP this matches the request but bcrypt should be on the roadmap.

POS.jsx + AdminDashboard.jsx are getting large (POS ~ several screens, AdminDashboard.jsx 992 lines). Consider splitting AdminDashboard.jsx into smaller components (UsersTab, SalesTab, DashboardTab) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

Backfill in /api/sales for legacy docs (setdefault order_type='mesa') means a legacy 'llevar' sale missing the field would be displayed as 'mesa' — minor since user said old ventas were deleted, but worth a note.
Frontend window.confirm() for delete is functional but Sonner/AlertDialog would feel more consistent with the rest of the UI.
/api/users PUT does not enforce role on update (cashier role cannot be removed via UserUpdate). That's intentional but should be documented.
test_credentials: admin/taco123, valle_dorado/valle123, mezcalitos/mezca123, san_vicente/vicente123, pi/pi123, san_jose/jose123, valle_caja2/caja2pass (Valle Dorado · Caja 2). Source: /app/memory/test_credentials.md + DEFAULT_USERS + iter-3 seed.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created and DELETED their own TEST_caja_xxx user (cleaned up). Tests also created today sales: 1 efectivo Valle Dorado/Caja 1 mesa ($60), 1 efectivo llevar ($30), 1 efectivo domicilio ($30), 1 tarjeta Valle Dorado/Caja 2 llevar ($105 with $15 tip). Frontend POS flow created 1 efectivo mesa sale Valle Dorado/Caja 2 ($60, cash=$100, change=$40). Frontend Users CRUD created and then DELETED test_ui_xxx user. All test users cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is now iteration-3 schema (sale requires order_type; users have caja_name; POST/DELETE /api/users available). Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://mobile-checkout-pos.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/. Frontend testids confirmed: btn-payment-{efectivo|transferencia|tarjeta} (NOT 'pay-*'); btn-ordertype-{mesa|llevar|domicilio}; tip-percent-{5|10|15|20} (only when payment_method in tarjeta/transferencia); input-mesa visible only when order_type=mesa; input-cash-received visible only when payment_method=efectivo with change-display computing on the fly. Admin tabs are buttons (Dashboard/Ventas/Precios/Usuarios) — use get_by_role('button', name='Usuarios') instead of role=tab. caja-filter only renders after a sucursal is selected (not 'todas'). Users delete uses window.confirm(); register page.once('dialog', d.accept()).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration. All 25 feature checks from the review_request pass.
